programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as a hitman whose latest mission puts him on a bullet train travelling from Tokyo to Morioka, alongside deadly adversaries from around the world. The question is: who will make it off the train alive at the final station?

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a Naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The G.I. Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra; they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future Part II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Back To The Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

After a catastrophic crash, a pilot discovers he's stranded on Earth - 65 million years ago! With only one chance at rescue, he and the other survivor must cross a terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk's out to emulate his father's deeds. Spock keeps him in check as an evil Romulan creates black holes to destroy the Federation. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they’re left stranded on a raft, 160 km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Two years after saving the world, Sam Witwicky returns to university as the Autobots and humans work together to stop a returning Decepticon threat, while pressure builds to remove the robots from Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Age Of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: True account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a Naval war games exercise.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history. Dan Brown's bestselling novel is thrillingly directed by Ron Howard.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.desc: Nick, Warrick, Sara and Greg are sent to eastern Nevada to investigate the disappearance of an entire family.

programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a shoot-out through the streets of Vegas, leaving a string of dead bodies including a rookie cop.

programme.desc: Werewolf in Vegas. The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess, an aging Vegas dancer and socialite. Several suspects are under the microscope.

programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues. They soon realize that the psychic’s ability to see into the future could be the cause of her own death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When three teenagers are shot to death, when trying to put up posters of their favourite rapper, the team is drawn into the world of hip-hop street gangs and all the violence that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs experience the wedding jitters when they investigate a case in which the mother of the groom is found dead, and tied to the couple's car by her pantyhose.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the assistant of a Hollywood entertainment mogul is murdered during his vacation in Vegas, the CSIs question how the young victim could afford to drive a Ferrari and lodge at a fancy hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Brass struggles for his life after being shot in the chest, the team investigates the murders of a decapitated victim with a civil war obsession, and a man who killed himself by partying too hard.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess, an aging Vegas dancer and socialite. Several suspects are under the microscope.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Lady Heather's daughter is found dead, Grissom and the CSI team are led into a twisted world of medical experimentation conducted by a crazed, Nazi-sympathising pseudo-scientist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A romantic evening ends abruptly when a dead body is found in the chimney of an ageing bachelor's house. Sara, Nick and Brass are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A young woman is found drugged and sexually assaulted in the hallway of her high-rise apartment building. The CSIs try to nail the psychotic criminal who appears to have a passion for pedicures.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues. They soon realize that the psychic’s ability to see into the future could be the cause of her own death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Brass struggles for his life after being shot in the chest, the team investigates the murders of a decapitated victim with a civil war obsession, and a man who killed himself by partying too hard.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead on the set of the famous show Ka by Cirque Du Soleil, the CSI must study the inner workings of the show to find out what happened.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The deceased victims in the CSI coroner's office give voice to their own murder investigations for the first time.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of brutal beatings that take place within the span of a few hours throughout the city, all done by a bizarre group of hooded people with strange physical features.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the case of a woman found dead in a church.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. She is everything Virginia is not –extroverted, direct, in possession of a strongly magnetic personality and, as Virginia notes, a pair of the most "amazing legs". Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen star in Mike Leigh's Oscar and BAFTA-nominated comedy-drama about a contented couple and their less fortunate friends and family. Strong language.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: This is the story of an ordinary man, reduced by years of oppressive office routine to a shadow existence, who at the eleventh hour makes a supreme effort to turn his dull life into something wonderful.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Adapted by Ian McEwan from his bestselling novel, the drama centers on a young couple of drastically different backgrounds in the summer of 1962. Following the pair through their idyllic courtship, this movie explores sex and the societal pressure that can accompany physical intimacy, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Drama depicting the relationship between golfing champions Old Tom Morris and his son.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: Based on Peter Turner's memoir, the film follows the playful but passionate relationship between Turner and the eccentric Academy Award-Winning Actress Gloria Grahame in 1978 Liverpool. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. Their passion and lust for life is tested to the limits by events beyond their control.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: Oranges and Sunshine tells the real-life story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham, who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals in recent times: the organised deportation of children in care from the United Kingdom to Australia. Almost single-handedly, against overwhelming odds and with little regard for her own well-being, Margaret reunited thousands of families.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Lollipop
programme.desc: Molly, a young woman recently released from prison, struggles to regain custody of her children. Joining forces with her childhood friend Amina, they take destiny into their own hands.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, socially awkward Iona and her cat-obsessed mother Lyn move to a new town. Together the pair put on a brave face, finding and creating comfort as one another’s sole friend. However, life begins to get tricky after the town’s small-minded denizens reveal themselves to be as petty and cruel as those from the town they just fled. At school, Iona finds herself targeted by a trio of mean girls who exploit her naïveté. Across town, Lyn attempts to make friends and is flatly rejected by a knitting circle of mean women who find her very existence repugnant. Daughter and mother find refuge in an elaborate fantasy world founded on denial and delusion; ultimately distance between them just when they need each other most.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: Growing up poor in Madras, India, Srinivasa Ramanujan Iyengar earns admittance to Cambridge University during WWI, where he becomes a pioneer in mathematical theories with the guidance of his professor, G.H. Hardy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold, a quiet and seemingly ordinary man in his sixties, is shaken when he learns that his old friend Queenie is dying in a distant hospice. On impulse, he sets out to mail a letter to her, but instead begins walking, convinced that as long as he keeps moving, she will live. His journey spans 450 miles, forcing him to confront memories, regrets, and the growing concern and loneliness of his wife, Maureen, who is left behind at home.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Suffragette movingly explores the passion and heartbreak of those who risked all they had for women's right to vote - their jobs, their homes, their children, and even their lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Lies We Tell
programme.desc: An heiress is forced to embrace her family's dark legacy, but the wolves begin to circle when she does. Gothic period drama, starring Agnes O'Casey

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: On a warm spring day in 1924, house maid and foundling Jane Fairchild (Odessa Young) finds herself alone on Mother’s Day. Her employers, Mr and Mrs Niven (Colin Firth and Olivia Colman), are out and she has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, Paul (Josh O’Connor), the boy from the manor house nearby who is Jane’s long-term love despite the fact that he’s engaged to be married to another woman, a childhood friend and daughter of his parents’ friends. But events that neither can foresee will change the course of Jane’s life forever.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: Chéri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Happy New Year, Colin Burstead
programme.desc: Colin Burstead hires a lavish country manor for his extended family to celebrate New Year. Unfortunately for Colin his position of power in the family is under serious threat from the arrival of his estranged brother David. Festival favorite and multiple award-winning director Ben Wheatley has made his name through his dark humor and twisted plots and settings. In Happy New Year, Colin Burstead he takes on the drama that a family get-together can mean, in a way that only he could.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Based on the infamous 1941 true story, Whisky Galore! is a charming and heart-warming tale of a close-knit Scottish island community who mischievously relieve a sinking cargo ship of cases of whisky during wartime scarcity. The ensuing merriment is threatened when Excise Men try to spoil the party by catching the crafty locals, red handed, with the bottled loot. After enduring a ‘dry’ period, the shipwreck and its amber cargo was like mana from heaven to the islanders, to whom whisky was part of the very life blood of their Island!”
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Angels' Share
programme.desc: Narrowly avoiding jail, new dad Robbie vows to turn over a new leaf. A visit to a whisky distillery inspires him and his mates to seek a way out of their hopeless lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Sorry We Missed You
programme.desc: Ricky and his family struggle with debt after the financial crash of 2008. An opportunity arrives in a shiny new van and a self-employed delivery driver franchise, but it also brings new challenges.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice, a sleep doctor haunted by the mysterious death of her younger brother, must abandon all her rational scientific reasoning when she comes across a family terrorized by a demon that feeds on its victims by paralyzing them while they sleep. In order to defeat the dark spirit who was also responsible for her brother’s death, Alice must journey into her own nightmares.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: A casino manager in 1970s Las Vegas faces threats from a troubled old friend, an FBI investigation, corrupt politicians, and his wife’s painful past. This crime drama explores power, betrayal, and the unraveling of a man’s empire.

programme.desc: A cop known for his unorthodox methods teams up with a talented but unruly police dog to take down a powerful drug dealer who has already tried to kill him.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.
